description: Stratify a patient cohort by biomarker profile (PD-L1 TPS categories, HER2 IHC/FISH status, or a generic threshold) and emit classified data plus group distribution and statistical comparisons.
rules: read-only — reads one CSV, writes only under record_store
no INPUT_CSV (or empty) falls back to the built-in seeded example cohort
BIOMARKER + THRESHOLD together trigger a generic binary split; either may be omitted
primary output is classified_data.csv; group_distribution.csv / statistical_comparisons.csv are written when a stratifier is resolved
usage: Set INPUT_CSV (patient/biomarker CSV; omit for example data), optionally BIOMARKER (column) and THRESHOLD (cut-point). Output: classified_data.csv.
limitation: scikit-learn clustering paths are optional and not exercised here. Statistical comparisons assume a 2-group stratifier. Requires pandas/numpy/scipy at run time.
